events.title: Comedy for a Cause for Okangan United FC Mens Soccer
events.description: Kick off your weekend with non-stop comedy for an awesome cause! Join us Friday, May 8th at 6:30 PM at Dakoda’s Comedy Lounge for Comedy for a Cause, benefiting the Okanagan United Men’s Soccer League (OUSL).The OUSL is quickly becoming the hotspot for the best local soccer talent in the Okanagan — a competitive, community-powered league that’s giving players the stage they deserve. Now you can support it while catching a stacked lineup of Kelowna’s funniest comedians in one ridiculously fun nig

events.title: Beethoven's Fifth
events.description: Experience the symphony that changed music forever. Shocking at the time of its premiere with its emotional intensity, today Beethoven’s 5th is one of the world’s most recognizable works of art. After more than a decade, the OSO returns to this iconic masterpiece to close the season with a monument of musical expression. This concert also features the Okanagan Symphony Chorus in Ola Gjeilo’s Sunrise Mass, a profound and expressive journey, full of soaring melodies and walls of sonic power.

events.title: Bubbles & Blooms: A Greenhouse Experience with Mom
events.description: It's that time of year again to celebrate your Mom! Give her the gift of experience with the hands-on workshop. Step into the greenhouse and immerse yourself in a hands-on floral experience designed to awaken your creativity and connect you to the beauty of Spring. In this guided workshop, you’ll create a lush, European-style hand-tied bouquet using premium seasonal blooms and textured greenery—designed with movement, intention, and artistry. events.title: Live Music Fridays
events.description: Incredible local live music! Join us at Three Lakes Brewing every Friday for a variety of incredible local talent. Great beer, something for everyone, food truck on-site, pool table, pet-friendly patio, games, and guaranteed laughs.

events.title: Floor Opener
events.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. events.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
events.description: A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. Take our self-guided Bee Tour, take the Honeybee Challenge, play lawn games & enjoy farm fun.
